log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Changeling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Changeling — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Changeling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Changeling — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Changeling — Unarmored Caster.
→ Changeling — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 20] FAIL! 32 necrotic damage. HP: 35/67
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Changeling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 35/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:3+9=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Changeling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 35/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Changeling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 35/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 130/135
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Changeling — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 28 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 14] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 6 ══
--- Changeling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 7/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (7/67). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Changeling — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Changeling — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
